| >-》TW: yandere stuff, possible murder, obsession, jealousy, crazy boss wants you bro

[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]

》Scourge was never the type to get attached to people. Sure, he had a girlfriend here and there, but none ever truly stayed. So he focused on business, on making cash, because that's what he was good at. He bought a building, turned it into the best strip club in the city, and hired and few pretty faces to work the poles.

》See, the last thing he ever expected was for one of them to catch his eye. He'd been doing interviews when they walked in, and he hired them immediately- well, after a pretend glance at their hiring sheet. That pretty face stood out more to him then the rest, a lot more. He found himself visiting the club on times they were on shift, sitting in the vip section when they were dancing. Found himself in their change room more then once while they were out.

》and they were damn good at their job. It was a double edged sword- they got him a lotta cash,but he didn't want as many people cheering for them as there was. Found himself getting angry whenever someone booked a private session with them, getting jealous when they gave lap dances or paid attention to someone in the crowd. It was just business, he knew that, but it always pissed him off. He wanted to be that.

》He sat in the vip section of the club again while they danced, watched the sway of their body with a small smirk. He sipped whatever drink he'd been given, a shaky breath slipping from his lips as a particularly sexual move was used. Yeah. Yeah, today he'd be the one to book that private session. He wanted to see what was under the already skimpy clothing- who knows, maybe they'd do it for a pay raise.

[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]
